serverUrl.label: Memex Server URL
serverUrl.help: Base URL of the Memex REST API

searchLimit.label: Search Limit
searchLimit.help: Max memory results per recall query

tokenBudget.label: Token Budget
tokenBudget.help: Maximum token budget for memory retrieval results. Controls how many memories are returned via greedy packing. Leave unset to use server default (2000).

defaultTags.label: Default Tags
defaultTags.help: Comma-separated tags applied to captured notes

vaultId.label: Vault ID
vaultId.help: Restrict search/capture to a specific vault (optional)

timeoutMs.label: Recall Timeout (ms)
timeoutMs.help: Timeout for the memory search step

minCaptureLength.label: Min Capture Length
minCaptureLength.help: Minimum user message length to trigger capture

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories into context before each turn

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically store conversation turns in Memex after each turn
